User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the AgriWise application, encompassing various roles such as Farmer, Expert, Government Authority, or Logistics Provider.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for identification and communication.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

role.description: The primary role of the user (e.g., Farmer, Expert, Authority, Logistics).

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language (e.g., English, Hindi, Punjabi, Bengali).
